items.key: ((@@admin = 1) or (ma_dvcs in (select ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and (r_new = 1 or r_edit = 1 or r_del = 1 or r_access = 1)))) and status = '1'
items.check: ((@@admin = 1) or (ma_dvcs in (select ma_dvcs from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and (r_new = 1 or r_edit = 1 or r_del = 1 or r_access = 1))))

items.key: (ma_dvcs = '{$%c[ma_dvcs]}') and (not exists(select 1 from syssiterights where user_id = @@userID) or ma_kho in (select ma_kho from syssiterights where user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: (ma_dvcs = '{$%c[ma_dvcs]}') and (not exists(select 1 from syssiterights where user_id = @@userID) or ma_kho in (select ma_kho from syssiterights where user_id = @@userID))

footer.v: 1 - Chênh lệch thiếu, 2 - Chênh lệch thừa

dir.commands:
select 'init$VoucherFilter$(this);' as message return
&XMLWhenFilterLoading; &XMLWhenFilterClosing;
declare @vcID varchar(33) select @vcID = stt_rec from kkyc where so_ct = @so_ct exec rs_AutoGenerateStocktakingView @vcID, @ma_dvcs, @ma_kho, @type, @@language, @@userID, @@admin
declare @$none nvarchar(512), @vcDate smalldatetime, @vcID varchar(33) select @vcDate = ngay_ct, @vcID = stt_rec from kkyc with(index(so_ct)) where so_ct = @so_ct and ngay_ct between @ngay_ct1 and @ngay_ct2 if @vcDate is null begin select @$none = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Không có yêu cầu kiểm kê theo điều kiện đang lọc.' else N'No data matching filter condition.' end select 'so_ct' as field, isnull(@$none, '') as message end select '' as message, '' as field, 'this.grid._$k=''' + rtrim(@vcID) + ''';' as script return
